rules.description: Hyper + shift + symbol/digit → Cmd Ctrl Option Shift + key (shift-sensitive keys need explicit rule to beat the generic one)
Hyper + comma → F13 proxy (avoids Carbon shift+, = < bug)
Hyper + dot → F14 proxy (avoids Carbon shift+. = > bug)
Hyper + slash → F15 proxy (avoids Carbon shift+/ = ? bug)
While hyper is active, send Command Control Option Shift plus key
Caps Lock sets hyper variable while held. Tap toggles tile layout.
